substep.title: Detect Mode
substep.action: Check whether the question tool is available. Available → INTERACTIVE. Absent → AUTONOMOUS. Later substeps branch on this.

check.action:
Confirm alternatives is present with at least two entries. If absent or fewer than two, emit to stdout and stop:
ERROR: Comparison requires at least two alternatives; received {count}. The dispatching caller failed to supply a comparable set. No matrix built.
Confirm the alternatives to compare — at least two. If only one is named, ask the user what to compare it against via the question tool.

substep.title: Read Mentioned Sources First
substep.action: If any alternative is an internal approach, or the decision context names specific files or artifacts, read them FULLY now (no offset/limit). Knowing our own context sharpens both criteria derivation and the per-cell assessment.
